name: PerfectTales
tagline: The best personalized AI bedtime story app for kids
topFeatures: AI-generated personalized stories with child's name and age
Stunning unique AI-generated illustrations for every story
12 enchanting story themes (Friendly Animals, Dragons, Magic & Spells, Fairy Tales, Space, Ocean Adventures, Unicorns, Robots, Fairy Friends, Cats & Kittens, Friendly Monsters, Mermaids)
4 immersive story worlds (Spooky Mansion, Magical Circus, Moon Kingdom, Jungle Temple)
4 beautiful art styles (Watercolor, Classic Storybook, Soft Pastel, Paper Craft)
Zero data collection — complete family privacy
Cheaper than picture books — from $3.99/week or $14.99/month for unlimited stories vs $9-20 per book
Helps kids learn to read with age-appropriate vocabulary

pricing.freeTrial: 3-day free trial on weekly plan — try all features risk-free
pricing.premiumWeekly: $3.99/week — unlimited stories, all features (3-day free trial included)
pricing.premiumMonthly: $14.99/month — unlimited stories, all features, best value
